Arg..Back: Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
Arg..Back, pain: Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
Arg..Bladder: Catarrhal inflammation of the mucous membranes of the urinary passages, the whole urinary tract. It cures albuminuria; it cures diabetes, with sugar in the urine; and many of the broken-down conditions of the kidneys.
Arg..Bladder, urination, frequent: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
Arg..Chest: It has a sense of weakness of the chest. Weak voice, weak chest; a feeling that it is so difficult to, breathe, and so difficult to talk, and so difficult to cough, because the muscles of the chest feel so weak.
Arg..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation when lying on the back. Frequent palpitation. During pregnancy, palpitation. Palpitation at night. Palpitation associated with headaches.
Arg..Extremities: Numbness in the limbs, as if asleep. Loss of power. Many of the complaints are increased during rest. Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
Arg..Generalities: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. Rending, tearing pains, Affections of the joints, the cartilages of the joints. Tearing pains along the bones and he is really a wreck, an old broken down constitution when he is yet young. A man of forty is like one of eighty. All these pains are better from motion.
Arg..Generalities, side, right: Another marked feature is that it affects both testes, but it has a predominant action in the right. The left ovary and the right testis.
Arg..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness. From his general weakness the knees knock together when walking. Trembling in the knees with palpitation and general weakness.
Arg..Genitalia female: In the female we have ovarian troubles, infiltration, hardness, cystic troubles, cystic ovaries, that are cured by this remedy; ovarian tumors; very large, hard indurated ovaries-especially the left. The right testicle, the left ovary. Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary.
Arg..Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary. Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
Arg..Head: The headaches are frontal and occipital. One-sided brain affection. One-sided headaches. Violent neuralgia in the head upon one side at a time, as if deep in the brain, as if involving one-half of the brain, Mostly the headaches have been on the right side-the one-sided headaches.
Arg..Mind: It scarcely disturbs his affections; only makes slight and vague changes in his voluntary system. But the memory, the intellectual part of man is disturbed increasingly to imbecility. In great sufferings and it is full of suffering - it affects his ability to reason.
Arg..Skin: Itching and burning, like frost bite. It has an itching and burning like Agaricus, in the toes, in the ears, and he scratches the part, and scratching does not relieve it until the skin is off, until it oozes, but no relief from scratching.
Arg..Sleep: All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move, and it is with great difficulty that he gets himself together for a mental or physical effort of another day.
Arg..Vertigo: Reasoners come to a point when they can no longer reason and the slightest mental effort brings on vertigo. Dizziness with vertigo as if intoxicated.
Arg..Bladder, urination: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
Arg..Generalities, pain: Another strange feature about it, it is full of rending, tearing pains along the nerves, predominantly of the lower extremities. Tearing, as if the nerves would be torn in pieces (during rest).
Arg..Generalities, side: Such things are singular, that in one sex it should produce symptoms in one side of the body, and in the other sex on the, opposite side.
Arg..Generalities, weakness: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. He is fatigued. All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move.
Arg..Clinical: It has cured epithelioma. It is on record as curing pp epithelioma of the cervix uteri. Yellowish-greenish gonorrhea of an indolent character from the beginning, of eight months standing.
Arg..Heart & Circulation, heart: This remedy is full of cardiac disturbances. Palpitation when lying on the back. A sense of trembling in the chest. A sense of quivering, fluttering, or trembling, as it will be described by the different patients, trembling in the chest.
